title: Workplan, Work Packages, Activities, Milestones, Deliverables and Timing

assumptions.text: Budget figures for each WP to be provided by CFO team. WP1 must not exceed 40% of max grant; post-operation (WP3-WP7) must be at least 10% of max grant.
Grant agreement signature estimated Q1 2027. All milestone dates are relative to M0.
Gantt chart annex to be prepared separately using the EU Portal template.
Equipment lead times (furnace 9-12 months, spray dryer 6-9 months) are estimates based on current market conditions. Supply chain disruptions could extend these.

open_issues.text: Specific budget figures needed from CFO team for each WP to verify 40% WP1 cap and 10% post-operation minimum.
Gantt chart annex not yet prepared. Must be consistent with this section.
GHG performance clause: maximum grant only paid if project reaches at least 75% of planned total GHG emission avoidance. Monitoring methodology needs to be detailed in GHG monitoring plan (D2.6).
Word count (3200) is below target (4000). WP2 activities could be expanded with more construction detail, and WP3 ramp-up activities could include more DT calibration specifics.

evaluation_criterion: Section 7 contributes to Operational Maturity scoring (3.3) — implementation plan consistency

compliance_checks.mandatory_wp_structure: PASS — WP1 (FC), WP2 (EiO), WP3-WP7 (5 operational years) all present
compliance_checks.wp1_budget_cap: PENDING — budget figures not yet provided; requirement noted
compliance_checks.post_operation_budget_minimum: PENDING — budget figures not yet provided; requirement noted
compliance_checks.mandatory_deliverables_wp3: PASS — GHG report and KS report included
compliance_checks.mandatory_deliverables_wpn: PASS — verified GHG report, innovation report, DNSH report, EEA declaration all included
compliance_checks.milestone_means_of_verification: PASS — all milestones have means of verification
